text: 大家一定以为我失联了。失踪了。
column5: #texten:Everyone must think I went missing. Disappeared.

text: 但我只是……不知道时间过了那么久。
column5: #texten:But I just... didn't know so much time had passed.

text: 我认识的人……现在还好吗。
column5: #texten:The people I knew... are they still okay.

text: 这一页的笔记……笔迹在发抖。
column5: #texten:The handwriting on this page... it's shaking.

text: §Ø_∆.µΩ写了什么'光速''时间膨胀'之类的词。
column5: #texten:§Ø_∆.µΩ wrote something about 'speed of light' and 'time dilation.'

text: 我看不太懂……但§Ø_∆.µΩ的语气突然变了。
column5: #texten:I can't quite understand it... but §Ø_∆.µΩ's tone suddenly changed.
